title: Phase 0 — Foundations & toolchain
description: Repo, scaffold, deps, local PocketBase, CI. See IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md §Phase 0.

title: FED-0.5 — Local PocketBase dev setup
description: Containerized PocketBase dev setup (no host binary): backend/pocketbase/ with pinned-version Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml (pb_data volume, port mapping), pb_migrations/ + pb_hooks/ mounted, .env.example, run script (docker compose up), Automigrate in dev, README. Goal: 'docker compose up' serves PocketBase locally.
close_reason: Containerized PocketBase v0.39.4 backend: Dockerfile + compose + README; build/health smoke-tested OK; no host binary, no .env

title: Phase 1 — Backend: schema, rules, hooks
description: All PocketBase collections as migrations, API access rules, JS hooks. The data contract. §Phase 1.
close_reason: All 13 children complete (FED-1.1–1.13). Backend schema (15 collections), API access rules (security boundary), JS hooks (case_number/quarantine/status/handoff/field-guard), German conditions seed, and a 41-assertion rule/hook test suite wired into CI. DoD met: schema reproducible from migrations on a clean instance; access rules proven by tests; sample data loads.

title: FED-1.11 — API access rules
description: Collection rules on every collection: private-by-default + case_shares + roles (carer / coordinator all-read / supervisor all) + org scope. The security boundary.
close_reason: API access rules on all 14 app collections + users authRule(is_active). Private-by-default + case_shares(read/edit) + role scope + org scope; finders PII gated by case visibility; animals/markings org-readable for re-ID. Edit-share correlation verified safe on PB 0.39.4. End-to-end tested across owner/read/edit/outsider/supervisor/coordinator + deactivated-auth + down-revert.

close_reason: finders (PII, all-optional contact fields) + cases (care episode: animal/case_number[unique idx]/age_class/intake+find_geo geoPoint/reasons multi-select/quarantine/status/is_releasable/active_carer/optional exam_* fields/org). Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-0.1 — Repo init & structure
description: git init, pub-workspace repo layout (apps/, packages/, backend/, docs/), .gitignore (pb_data, build, .env), licence.
close_reason: Repo structure, .gitignore, AGPL-3.0 license, README, docs/ established; backend set to fully containerized

title: FED-3.0 — Server configuration (instance URL, first-run)
description: NATIVE (Android/iOS) ONLY, Nextcloud-style first-run flow: before login the user enters their Federfall server URL. Validate (normalize scheme/host, probe GET /api/health, clear errors for unreachable/invalid/non-Federfall), persist (shared_preferences), feed PB client base URL (FED-2.1). Re-configurable later via 'switch server'. ON WEB this screen is SKIPPED entirely: base URL = the app's own serving origin (Uri.base.origin) since backend+frontend share the domain. Includes setup screen UI, validation logic, persisted-URL provider, and platform branch.
acceptance_criteria: On native first launch with no stored URL: server-config screen shown; valid reachable URL accepted/persisted/routed to login; invalid/unreachable shows inline error and blocks; after restart stored URL reused (setup skipped); 'switch server' clears it back to setup. On web: setup screen never shown; base URL resolves to the serving origin.
close_reason: Implemented server-config validation (normalizeServerUrl + ServerProbe: probe /api/health, classify invalid/unreachable/not-Federfall) and the real first-run setup screen (form, inline errors, busy state, persist-on-success → gate routes to login). Phase 2 had already wired ServerConfig/storage/controller/router-gate/PB-provider. 'Switch server' UI entry point deferred to FED-3.1 login (clearServerUrl mechanism in place). 54 tests pass, analyzer clean.

title: FED-8.5 — Release builds (M4=MVP)
description: Android (Play internal), iOS (TestFlight), Web prod; German store metadata. MVP shipped.

title: FED-8.4 — Test pass (~80%) + golden + E2E
description: Domain/repo coverage to ~80% + golden tests + a few patrol E2E happy-paths.

title: FED-3.5 — Deploy walking skeleton (M1)
description: Containerized deploy on VPS: Docker Compose stack — Caddy (auto-TLS, reverse proxy, SPA rewrites for Flutter web) + PocketBase container (pinned image, pb_data volume) + Litestream sidecar for SQLite backups; CORS origins configured; Flutter web build served; one mobile debug build. Reproducible via 'docker compose up -d'; no host-level systemd/binary.

title: FED-3.4 — Minimal case slice
description: Minimal create-case (name+species+reason) → list of my cases → case detail stub.
close_reason: Minimal case slice: create-case (name+species+reason → creates animal then case with active_carer=self; hooks fill case_number/status/quarantine), my-cases list on home (forCarer, newest first, +FAB, logout), case detail stub (case number/animal/status/reasons). Added CasesRepository.forCarer. Code-list labels (AdmissionReason/CaseStatus) localized via arb. Tests: forCarer, home (empty/list/logout), new-case (create + reason-required). 64 app + data tests pass, analyzer clean.

title: FED-4.3 — Case detail overview
description: Case detail (name-first label, status, timeline).
close_reason: Case detail overview: name-first header (animal name → species · case number, status chip), intake summary card incl. linked finder, and a chronological timeline seeded from intake milestones for later Phase 4 slices to extend.

title: FED-4.1 — Full intake + animal link + finder
description: Full intake form (light + photos) + create/link animal; finder capture.
close_reason: Full intake form: animal (name/species/sex), intake (multi-select reasons, age class, found/admitted dates, find location, weight, notes) and optional finder capture. Photo upload deferred to FED-4.7 (needs file-upload infra); map-based find-location is FED-4.2.

title: FED-4.11 — Disposition (release/died/euth/transfer/return)
description: Release (location/geo) · died · euthanized · transferred · returned-to-owner.

title: FED-1.12 — JS hooks
description: Auto case_number (per-year), default quarantine_until (+14d), maintain status/lifetime_status, share-on-handoff (previous carer keeps read).
notes: FED-1.11 left users.updateRule SUPERVISOR-ONLY. To enable self-service profile edit (FED-3.3), widen users.updateRule to allow self (@request.auth.id = id) BUT add an onRecordUpdateRequest hook that rejects any change to role/org/is_active by a non-supervisor (prevent privilege escalation). Until that guard exists, keep updateRule supervisor-only.
close_reason: pb_hooks/main.pb.js: (1) cases auto case_number per-year+org / quarantine_until +14d / status default; (2) dispositions maintain case.status + animal.lifetime_status/current_aviary; (3) share-on-handoff (prev carer keeps read); (4) users field-guard blocks role/org/is_active/verified escalation by non-supervisors. Migration 1700000011 widens users.updateRule to self+supervisor (safe behind guard). All 5 behaviors verified live on PB 0.39.4; learned PB hook callbacks run in isolated VMs so helpers must be inlined.

title: FED-2.5 — Theming + l10n + base widgets
description: Theme, German l10n scaffolding, base widgets (forms, buttons, async/error states).
close_reason: Material 3 theme (teal-green seed, light+dark, tuned components) + spacing tokens; German-default l10n with base strings (loading/error/actions/validation); base widgets (LoadingView, ErrorView, EmptyView, AsyncValueView, PrimaryButton, AppTextField) + localized Validators. 12 new tests; app uses AppTheme + de locale.

description: Intake → treatment → disposition, re-admission. Milestone M2. §Phase 4.

title: FED-1.6 — Migration: conditions + case_conditions
description: Conditions code list + case_conditions (certainty suspected/confirmed, onset/resolved dates).
close_reason: Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-2.4 — Routing
description: go_router: web usePathUrlStrategy, error/404 routes. Two-stage redirect gate: (1) native + no server configured -> /setup (FED-3.0); (2) unauthenticated -> /login; else app shell. On web the server is always configured (serving origin) so /setup never triggers.
close_reason: go_router with two-stage redirect gate (native-unconfigured→/setup, unauthenticated→/login, else home), splash while resolving, 404 errorBuilder, web path-URL strategy via conditional-import shim. AuthStatus provider exposes valid-session signal for the gate. Placeholder screens for FED-3.0/3.1/3.3. 4 gate tests.

title: FED-2.1 — PocketBase client + auth store
description: PB client provider + AsyncAuthStore over flutter_secure_storage (native) with web fallback. Base URL is PLATFORM-RESOLVED: web = app's own serving origin (Uri.base.origin); native = user-configured server URL (persisted, FED-3.0). Not hardcoded/env. Client rebuilds when URL changes (provider keyed on resolved URL); native unconfigured state exposed so routing can gate.
close_reason: PocketBase client provider built async over AsyncAuthStore; platform auth token storage (secure on native, prefs on web); ServerConfig resolution (web=origin, native=persisted/unconfigured) with setServerUrl/clearServerUrl; client keyed on config so switching servers rebuilds. 6 passing tests.

title: FED-1.8 — Migration: aviaries + dispositions
description: aviaries + dispositions (release vs placed_in_aviary vs died/euthanized/transferred/returned_to_owner).
notes: Also add the deferred current_aviary relation (animals → aviaries, nullable, maxSelect 1, cascadeDelete false) to the animals collection in this migration — it was deferred from FED-1.2 because aviaries didn't exist yet.
close_reason: Phase-1 leaf schema migrations 1700000005-09: markings (code-indexed, re-id), conditions+case_conditions code list, clinical logs (weights/medications/journal_entries/placements), aviaries+dispositions (+ deferred animals.current_aviary), case_shares (unique case+user idx). All verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: FED-1.13 — Rule/hook tests
description: Scripted tests against throwaway pb instance: verify visibility & handoff behaviour.
close_reason: backend/pocketbase/tests/{run.sh,test_rules.py}: throwaway-instance suite, 41 assertions covering schema/seed, all FED-1.12 hooks (case_number/quarantine/status/dispositions/share-on-handoff/field-guard) and the FED-1.11 rule matrix (private-default, read/edit shares incl. no-escalation, coordinator all-read, supervisor all, finder-PII gating, handoff visibility, deactivated-auth, org isolation). Wired into CI as 'backend-rules' job. Exit codes verified (pass=0, fail!=0).

title: FED-2.3 — Repository layer
description: Repository interfaces + PocketBase implementations for all collections (auth, cases, animals, weights, meds, journal, conditions, placements, dispositions, markings, aviaries, shares, finders).
close_reason: federfall_data package: generic Repository<T> interface + PbRepository base (CRUD, bound-param filters, ClientException→RepositoryException), AuthRepository (signIn/refresh/signOut/currentUser/changes), and typed repos for all collections (cases w/ interface for cache decorator, animals, finders, aviaries, conditions+case_conditions, weights/meds/journal/placements, markings, dispositions, case_shares) with case-scoped query helpers. App-side keepAlive providers bind each repo to the async client. 13 data tests + analyze clean.

title: FED-0.4 — Core dependencies
description: Add pocketbase, flutter_riverpod, go_router(+builder), freezed/json_serializable/build_runner, flutter_secure_storage, flutter_map, l10n.
close_reason: Core deps added (riverpod/go_router/pocketbase/freezed/flutter_map/secure_storage/shared_preferences + codegen+riverpod_lint); bloc removed, counter demo replaced with Riverpod ProviderScope; analyze clean, tests pass, build_runner codegen verified end-to-end

title: FED-0.3 — App identity & flavors
description: Name Federfall, app id de.jhbruhn.federfall, icon/splash placeholders, --dart-define-from-file wiring for dev/prod.
close_reason: App identity + native flavors (from scaffold) confirmed; dart-define-from-file config layer added (dart_defines/*.json + AppEnvironment), verified values flow through; analyze clean, tests pass. Icon/splash deferred to owner (federfall-gyt).

title: FED-0.6 — CI skeleton
description: GitHub Actions: format → analyze → test+coverage (~80% gate on domain/repo). Branch protection.
close_reason: CI workflow (format→analyze→test+coverage 80% gate, Flutter 3.44.3 pinned) added and dry-run green locally end-to-end; added app_environment test (100% app coverage). Branch protection deferred until a remote exists.

title: FED-3.2 — Invite/approval flow
description: Supervisor invites → accept-invite sets password → role assigned. No open self-registration.
close_reason: Invite/approval flow (PocketBase-native, SMTP-assumed): app-level supervisor invites via AuthRepository.inviteUser (creates users record active+throwaway pw, then requestPasswordReset email); invitee follows the emailed link to /auth/confirm-reset (gate opened for no-session), sets password via confirmPasswordReset, then logs in. Admin screen now hosts the invite form (email/name/role, supervisor-gated). No custom collection/endpoint. Deploy config (SMTP + reset email template URL) tracked in federfall-353. Tests: repo inviteUser/confirmPasswordReset, admin invite + auth gate, confirm-reset success/mismatch/missing-token, router gate reachability. 74 app + 24 data tests pass.

title: FED-3.1 — Login & session
description: Email+password login against the CONFIGURED server (after FED-3.0 server selection), session restore on launch, logout. Logout returns to login but keeps the server URL; offer 'change/switch server' which clears it back to /setup.
close_reason: Login & session: email+password sign-in via AuthRepository against the configured server; reactive currentUser provider; home shell shows signed-in user + logout (signOut → gate → /login, server URL kept); native-only 'switch server' clears URL back to /setup. Session restore via persisted AsyncAuthStore token + AuthStatus. l10n (en+de) + widget tests. 60 tests pass, analyzer clean.

title: Unified case chronology (merge timeline + journal)
description: Replace the two separate sections (intake-milestone timeline + journal list) on case detail with ONE time-ordered view. Intake milestones and journal entries interleave newest-first; future records (weights/meds/conditions/dispositions) plug in as additional event kinds. Refinement of FED-4.3/FED-4.7.
close_reason: Case detail now has one unified chronology: a shared TimelineItem (icon-dot rail + connecting line + date header) renders every event, so journal entries and intake milestones look consistent and all carry their date. Events interleave newest-first; future record kinds slot in. Replaces the separate JournalSection/_TimelineSection. Tests for ordering + empty state.

title: Journal entry edit & delete
description: Complete journal CRUD on top of FED-4.7: edit an entry's note/date, add new photos and remove existing attachments, and delete an entry (with confirm). Needs updateWithFiles() in the repository layer + the PocketBase partial file-update pattern (keep-list in body, new files appended).
close_reason: Journal CRUD complete: edit an entry's note/date with add/remove of attachments, and delete with confirm. Added updateWithFiles() (multipart, keep-list pattern) to the repo; generalized the entry sheet to create-or-edit; per-entry overflow menu for edit/delete. Tests for edit (drops removed attachment), delete, and updateWithFiles.

title: Intake photo upload (file-upload infra)
description: File-upload infra is DONE as of FED-4.7: PbRepository.createWithFiles() (multipart) + fileUrl() (incl. thumbs) landed and are tested. Remaining: wire intake_photos into the FED-4.1 intake form using the same infra (pick photos at intake, upload as multipart on case create). Small UI task now.

title: Configure PB SMTP + password-reset email template for invites
description: FED-3.2 invite flow is code-complete but needs deploy config to actually send mail: (1) SMTP settings in PocketBase; (2) point the users collection 'forgot password' email template action URL at the app's reset route, format: {APP_URL}/auth/confirm-reset?token={TOKEN} (the ConfirmResetScreen reads ?token=). Until then invites create the user but no email is delivered (locally use serve --dev to see the logged mail, or a mailpit/maildev container). SMTP creds are secrets — coordinate with user's no-.env preference (set in PB settings/volume, not committed).

title: Bootstrap first supervisor (doc + optional dev seed)
description: No users row is seeded (FED-1.1 seeds only the single organisations row), and registration is invite-only (FED-3.2). So the FIRST supervisor must be created out-of-band — chicken-and-egg for the invite flow and the M1 deploy. PocketBase superusers (admin UI) are NOT app-level Supervisors. Deliver: (1) a documented manual runbook step — create the first 'users' record via the PB admin UI with role=supervisor, is_active=true, org=<seeded org id>; (2) OPTIONAL dev-only guarded seed/script that upserts a local dev supervisor for testing (never run in prod). Currently only exists ad-hoc in local pb_data. Prereq for FED-3.2 (invite needs a supervisor) and required by FED-3.5 (deploy).

title: Generalize offline read cache to all collections
description: Extend FED-2.6 beyond recently-viewed cases: a generic RecordCache baked into PbRepository so every repository's getOne/list reads are cached and served offline on network failure, with writes updating/invalidating the cache. Replaces the cases-only decorator.
close_reason: Offline read cache generalized to ALL collections (not just cases). Pluggable RecordCache interface baked into PbRepository: every getOne/list caches raw records and is served from cache on network failure; writes refresh/evict. NoopRecordCache default keeps it opt-in. App provides bounded shared_preferences-backed PrefsRecordCache wired into all 14 repo providers. 13 cache/repo tests (7 data + 6 app).

title: App icon & splash (real artwork)
description: Replace very_good scaffold placeholder launcher icons and splash with the real Federfall artwork. Owner (Jan) will provide the source icon. Set up flutter_launcher_icons + flutter_native_splash (per-flavor if desired) and generate android/ios/web assets. Deferred from FED-0.3 at user request.

close_reason: Journal: dated free-text entries with photo attachments. Added multipart file-upload to the repository layer (createWithFiles + fileUrl with thumbnails); JournalSection on case detail (newest-first, photo thumbnails opening full-size), and a new-entry bottom sheet with gallery/camera picking via image_picker. iOS photo/camera usage descriptions added. Widget + data-layer tests.

description: Seed conditions (Trichomonadose, Paramyxovirose, Salmonellose, Fadenfuß, Spreizbein, Fraktur, MBD…) + reasons-for-admission list.
notes: conditions code list uses a SINGLE 'label' field (user's own language), NOT label_de/label_en — seed accordingly. Decision made during FED-1.6.
close_reason: Seeded 22 German feral-pigeon conditions into org00000default (single 'label' field per FED-1.6; PMV + Ornithose/Chlamydiose flagged is_notifiable). reasons-for-admission already an inline cases enum (FED-1.3), not seeded. Verified up+down on clean PB 0.39.4.

title: Phase 8 — Hardening, GDPR & release (M4=MVP)
description: Retention/export, MFA, tests, release builds, ops. Milestone M4. §Phase 8.

title: FED-3.3 — Role-gated nav & profile
description: Role-based navigation gating + minimal profile screen.
close_reason: Role-gated nav & profile: canManageTeam(role) capability helper (UI gate; server API rules remain the boundary), supervisor-only Verwaltung/admin entry in home app bar + screen-level role guard (stub for FED-3.2), profile screen (name/email/localized role) with sign-out relocated from home. UserRole labels localized via arb. Tests: home role-gating (carer hides admin / supervisor shows), profile (role+signout), admin gate (supervisor vs carer). 69 app tests pass, analyzer clean.

title: FED-2.7 — Error handling & logging
description: App-wide error handling, Result/failure types, logging.
close_reason: App-wide error handling & logging: AppLogger facade (level-gated, dart:developer) + provider; LoggingProviderObserver logs all provider failures; bootstrap wires FlutterError.onError + PlatformDispatcher.onError + observer through one logger. Result<T> (Ok/Err + guard/fold) for imperative outcomes. Localized errorMessage() maps RepositoryErrorKind→l10n. 7 tests.

title: FED-2.6 — Light offline read cache
description: Cache recently-viewed cases behind the repository (reads work offline; edits require connection).
close_reason: Offline read cache generalized to ALL collections (not just cases). Pluggable RecordCache interface baked into PbRepository: every getOne/list caches raw records and is served from cache on network failure; writes refresh/evict. NoopRecordCache default keeps it opt-in. App provides bounded shared_preferences-backed PrefsRecordCache wired into all 14 repo providers. 13 cache/repo tests (7 data + 6 app).

description: Expandable structured exam (BCS, dehydration, body-system findings).

title: FED-8.3 — Optional MFA
description: Optional MFA (encourage for supervisors).
